steps.text: Semantic binding: Ad Delivery • Entity: Line Delivery
Inventory Note added to the report document.
Reach KPI added to the report document.

steps.expression: (() => { const titles = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('.forge-report-builder__document-block-card strong')).map((node) => (node.innerText || node.textContent || '').trim()); return titles.length >= 2 && titles[0] === 'Reach KPI' && titles[1] === 'Inventory Note'; })()

steps.text: Saved exploration artifact: Report Builder Demo
Saved report payload: Report Builder Demo

steps.expression: (() => { const text = document.body?.innerText || document.body?.textContent || ''; const primary = text.indexOf('"blockId": "primaryBuilder"'); const kpi = text.indexOf('"blockId": "kpiBlock"'); const markdown = text.indexOf('"blockId": "markdownBlock"'); return primary >= 0 && kpi > primary && markdown > kpi; })()

(() => { const button = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('button')).find((entry) => ((entry.innerText || entry.textContent || '').trim() === 'Prepare get response')); if (!button) { throw new Error('Prepare get response button not found.'); } button.click(); })()

steps.text: Get ReportDocument response: Report Builder Demo

steps.expression: (() => { const button = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('button')).find((entry) => entry.getAttribute('aria-label') === 'Remove Inventory Note'); if (!button) { throw new Error('Remove Inventory Note button not found.'); } button.click(); })()

steps.text: Inventory Note removed from the authored report document.

steps.expression: (() => { const button = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('button')).find((entry) => ((entry.innerText || entry.textContent || '').trim() === 'Reopen in builder')); if (!button) { throw new Error('Reopen in builder button not found.'); } button.click(); })()

steps.text: Reopened ReportDocument Report Builder Demo for editing.

steps.expression: (() => { const titles = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('.forge-report-builder__document-block-card strong')).map((node) => (node.innerText || node.textContent || '').trim()); return titles.length >= 2 && titles[0] === 'Reach KPI' && titles[1] === 'Inventory Note'; })()

(() => { const root = document.querySelector('.forge-report-builder__runtime-preview'); const text = root?.innerText || root?.textContent || ''; return text.includes('Reach KPI') && text.includes('Inventory Note'); })()
